headline: Adnoc Acquires Shell's 221 SA Fuel Stations

article.title: Adnoc to Buy Shell's South African Fuel Stations
article.summary: Adnoc Distribution is has agreed to buy Shell fuel stations across South Africa in a deal valued at $1 billion. CEO Bader Saeed Al Lamki explained the rationale behind the move to Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa. (Source: Bloomberg)

headline: US Holds $1Bn Bitcoin Reserve Amid Market Turmoil

article.title: What Is the U.S. Strategic Bitcoin Reserve?
article.summary: The U.S. Strategic Bitcoin Reserve is a government-held stockpile of bitcoin, established by executive order in March 2025.
